results.evidence: reference/skills.md — dual activation examples added for 7 core skills (increment, do, auto, done, brainstorm, team-lead, grill, code-reviewer)
workflows/overview.md — natural language column added to quick reference table
commands/overview.md — natural language alternatives added to essential workflow table
skills/fundamentals.md — corrected from '22 plugins with 126 skills' to '1 unified plugin with 44 skills + 5 vskill marketplace plugins'
reference/skills.md — removed 10 non-existent plugin references (backend, frontend, testing, infra, k8s, kafka, confluent, payments, cost, docs)
reference/skills.md — Installing Domain Plugins section lists only actual marketplace plugins (mobile, skills, marketing, productivity, google-workspace)
All vskill add specweave --plugin X instances replaced with npx vskill install --repo anton-abyzov/specweave --plugin sw
Non-existent plugin install commands (sw-github, sw-jira, sw-ado, sw-diagrams, sw-release) removed
sidebars.ts — Team-Lead Orchestration entry added to Agent Teams category
agent-teams-and-swarms.md — dual activation examples added for team-lead operations
sidebars.ts — team-lead visible as entry under Agent Teams
workflows/overview.md — 2 Mermaid diagrams fixed: emoji removed from Big Picture and Hotfix Pattern node labels

findings.description: Some secondary pages (lazy-plugin-loading.md, troubleshooting/common-errors.md) still contain old vskill add references — noted for future cleanup
